# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Azure OpenAI Assistant for Guided DSA Practice
- Summary: Highlight the new Azure OpenAI-powered assistant integrated into CodeGrind, guiding users through DSA problems with model-assisted hints and adaptive feedback.
- Slug: codegrind-new-azure-openai-assistant-integration
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-new-azure-openai-assistant-integration
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-23-codegrind-new-azure-openai-assistant-integration.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now includes an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant that helps you solve LeetCode-style problems with contextual hints, multi-model support, and real-time guidance within the coding playground. It enhances learning without bypassing problem-solving effort.
- CTA: Try the AI-guided problem solve in CodeGrind today and compare your approach with model-assisted hints.
- Visual brief: A short, practical demo video showing the CodeGrind editor with the AI assistant: opening a LeetCode-style problem, the assistant suggesting hints, code editor updates in real-time, and a verdict panel after submission. Include UI cues for model switching and hint depth.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
